docs.title: ITS Ontology - Vehicle Topic Area
docs.text:
This ontology imports the Vehicle topic area modules.

The ITS Ontology - Vehicle Topic Area consists of the following patterns:

  • Vehicle Characteristics

The formal definition of this ontology is available in TURTLE Syntax.

docs.title: EmissionLevelCode
docs.text:
A code that indicates the emission level of a vehicle.

EXAMPLE: Euro 1, Euro 2, freeOfEmissions, LEV, ULEV etc.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated its-core_Code its-core:Code EmissionLevelCode EmissionLevelCode EmissionLevelCode->its-core_Code

docs.title: Formalization for EmissionLevelCode
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf its-core:Code

docs.title: Other annotations
docs.text: Property Value rdfs:seeAlso DATEX-II EmissionClassificationEuroEnum, DATEX-II LowEmissionLevelEnum

docs.title: FuelTypeCode
docs.text:
A code that indicates the type of fuel that is used by a vehicle.

EXAMPLE: gasoline, diesel, electric, etc.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated its-core_Code its-core:Code FuelTypeCode FuelTypeCode FuelTypeCode->its-core_Code

docs.title: Formalization for FuelTypeCode
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf its-core:Code

docs.title: Other annotations
docs.text: Property Value rdfs:seeAlso DATEX-II FuelTypeEnum

docs.title: GoodsTypeCode
docs.text:
A code that indicates the type of goods (especially hazardous goods) that is carried by a vehicle.

EXAMPLE: corrosive goods, explosive goods, radioactive goods, livestock, etc.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated its-core_Code its-core:Code GoodsTypeCode GoodsTypeCode GoodsTypeCode->its-core_Code

docs.title: Formalization for GoodsTypeCode
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf its-core:Code

docs.title: Other annotations
docs.text: Property Value rdfs:seeAlso DATEX-II LoadTypeEnum skos:editorialNote DATEX-II LoadTypeEnum was split between goods type and load type (e.g. wide load).

docs.title: LoadTypeCode
docs.text:
A code that indicates categories of load types that can affect the applicability of a regulation.

EXAMPLE: normal, wide load, over-height load, etc.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated ConditionCode ConditionCode LoadTypeCode LoadTypeCode LoadTypeCode->ConditionCode

docs.title: Formalization for LoadTypeCode
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf ConditionCode

docs.title: Other annotations
docs.text: Property Value rdfs:seeAlso DATEX-II LoadTypeEnum skos:editorialNote DATEX-II LoadTypeEnum was split between goods type and load type (e.g. wide load).

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated VehicleCharacteristic VehicleCharacteristic ofVehicleType yearOfFirstRegistration : xsd:gYear [0..1] FuelTypeCode FuelTypeCode VehicleCharacteristic->FuelTypeCode hasFuelType GoodsTypeCode GoodsTypeCode VehicleCharacteristic->GoodsTypeCode hasGoodsType 0..1 LoadTypeCode LoadTypeCode VehicleCharacteristic->LoadTypeCode hasLoadType 0..1 VehicleEquipmentCode VehicleEquipmentCode VehicleCharacteristic->VehicleEquipmentCode hasVehicleEquipment 0..1 VehicleUsageCode VehicleUsageCode VehicleCharacteristic->VehicleUsageCode hasVehicleUsage 0..1

docs.title: Formalization for VehicleCharacteristic
docs.text: Property Constraint hasFuelType only FuelTypeCode hasGoodsType only GoodsTypeCode hasLoadType only LoadTypeCode hasVehicleEquipment only VehicleEquipmentCode hasVehicleUsage only VehicleUsageCode ofVehicleType only VehicleTypeCode yearOfFirstRegistration datatype xsd:gYear

docs.title: VehicleCharacteristics
docs.text: Characteristics of a vehicle.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated RegulationThing RegulationThing VehicleCharacteristics VehicleCharacteristics VehicleCharacteristics->RegulationThing cdm1_Length cdm1:Length VehicleCharacteristics->cdm1_Length hasHeight cdm1_Mass cdm1:Mass VehicleCharacteristics->cdm1_Mass hasGrossMass VehicleCharacteristics->cdm1_Mass hasKerbMass VehicleCharacteristics->cdm1_Mass hasMaximumAllowedMass

docs.title: Formalization for VehicleCharacteristics
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf RegulationThing

docs.title: Other annotations
docs.text: Property Value rdfs:seeAlso DATEX-II VehicleCharacteristics skos:editorialNote Some items are plural and some are not; it is not entirely clear why the multiplicity is shown as is.

docs.title: Vehicle Characteristics Pattern
docs.text:
This ontology defines patterns for vehicle characteristics.

This pattern imports the following files:

  • https://w3id.org/citydata/part1/v1/
  • https://w3id.org/itsdata/core/v1/

This pattern consists of the following classes:

  • Emission Level Code
  • Fuel Type Code
  • Goods Type Code
  • Load Type Code
  • Vehicle Characteristics
  • Vehicle Equipment Code
  • Vehicle Type Code

  • Vehicle Usage Code This module defines the following properties:

  • hasFuelType

  • hasGoodsType
  • hasGrossMass
  • hasHeaviestAxleMass
  • hasHeight
  • hasKerbMass
  • hasLength
  • hasLoadType
  • hasMaximumAllowedMass
  • hasNumberOfAxles
  • hasVehicleEquipment
  • hasVehicleType
  • hasVehicleUsage
  • hasWidth
  • yearOfFirstRegistration

The formal definition of this pattern is available in TURTLE Syntax in two files, the core semantics and the SHACL restrictions.

docs.title: VehicleEquipmentCode
docs.text:
A code that indicates the type of equipment that is carried by a vehicle.

EXAMPLE: trailer attached, snow tyres, snow chains on-board, snow chains in use, snow chains not in use, etc.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated its-core_Code its-core:Code VehicleEquipmentCode VehicleEquipmentCode VehicleEquipmentCode->its-core_Code

docs.title: Formalization for VehicleEquipmentCode
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf its-core:Code

docs.title: Other annotations
docs.text: Property Value rdfs:seeAlso DATEX-II VehicleEquipmentEnum

docs.title: VehicleTypeCode
docs.text:
A code that indicates the type of vehicle.

EXAMPLE: car, bus, articulatedBus, heavyGoodsVehicle, moped, etc.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated its-core_Code its-core:Code VehicleTypeCode VehicleTypeCode VehicleTypeCode->its-core_Code

docs.title: Formalization for VehicleTypeCode
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf its-core:Code

docs.title: Other annotations
docs.text: Property Value rdfs:seeAlso DATEX-II VehicleTypeEnum

docs.title: VehicleUsageCode
docs.text:
A code that indicates the usage of a vehicle.

EXAMPLE: agricultural, car sharing, commercial, military, etc.

docs.title: Diagram
docs.text:
SVG (interactive)PNG

cluster_associated its-core_Code its-core:Code VehicleUsageCode VehicleUsageCode VehicleUsageCode->its-core_Code

docs.title: Formalization for VehicleUsageCode
docs.text: Property Constraint subClassOf its-core:Code

docs.title: Other annotations
docs.text: Property Value rdfs:seeAlso DATEX-II VehicleUsageEnum

docs.title: hasFuelType
docs.text:
Indicates the type of fuel that is used by the vehicle.

Domain: VehicleCharacteristic

Range: FuelTypeCode

docs.title: Used in classes
docs.text:
Class VehicleCharacteristic

IRI: https://w3id.org/itsdata/vehicle/v1/hasFuelType

docs.title: hasGoodsType
docs.text:
Indicates the type of goods (especially hazardous goods) being carried by the vehicle.

Domain: VehicleCharacteristic

Range: GoodsTypeCode

docs.title: Used in classes
docs.text:
Class VehicleCharacteristic

IRI: https://w3id.org/itsdata/vehicle/v1/hasGoodsType

docs.title: hasGrossMass
docs.text:
Current mass of the vehicle including passengers and cargo.

Domain: VehicleCharacteristic

Range: cdm1:Mass

IRI: https://w3id.org/itsdata/vehicle/v1/hasGrossMass

docs.title: hasHeaviestAxleMass
docs.text:
Mass of the heaviest axle of the vehicle.

Domain: VehicleCharacteristic

Range: cdm1:Mass

IRI: https://w3id.org/itsdata/vehicle/v1/hasHeaviestAxleMass

docs.title: hasHeight
docs.text:
Height of the vehicle.

Domain: VehicleCharacteristic

Range: cdm1:Length

IRI: https://w3id.org/itsdata/vehicle/v1/hasHeight

docs.title: hasKerbMass
docs.text:
Mass of the vehicle ready to drive without passengers or cargo.

Domain: VehicleCharacteristic

Range: cdm1:Mass

IRI: https://w3id.org/itsdata/vehicle/v1/hasKerbMass

docs.title: hasLength
docs.text:
Length of the vehicle, including the length of any trailers, couplings, embedded features etc..

Domain: VehicleCharacteristic

Range: cdm1:Length

IRI: https://w3id.org/itsdata/vehicle/v1/hasLength

docs.title: hasLoadType
docs.text:
Indicates any loading anomalies associated with the vehicle.

Domain: VehicleCharacteristic

Range: LoadTypeCode

docs.title: Used in classes
docs.text:
Class VehicleCharacteristic

IRI: https://w3id.org/itsdata/vehicle/v1/hasLoadType

docs.title: hasMaximumAllowedMass
docs.text:
Maximum mass of the vehicle including passengers and cargo.

Domain: VehicleCharacteristic

Range: cdm1:Mass

IRI: https://w3id.org/itsdata/vehicle/v1/hasMaximumAllowedMass

docs.title: hasNumberOfAxles
docs.text:
Number of axles of the vehicle.

Domain: VehicleCharacteristic

Range: xsd:nonNegativeInteger

IRI: https://w3id.org/itsdata/vehicle/v1/hasNumberOfAxles

docs.title: hasVehicleEquipment
docs.text:
Indicates the equipment that is carried by the vehicle.

Domain: VehicleCharacteristic

Range: VehicleEquipmentCode

docs.title: Used in classes
docs.text:
Class VehicleCharacteristic

IRI: https://w3id.org/itsdata/vehicle/v1/hasVehicleEquipment

docs.title: hasVehicleType
docs.text:
Indicates the type of the vehicle.

Domain: VehicleCharacteristic

Range: VehicleTypeCode

IRI: https://w3id.org/itsdata/vehicle/v1/hasVehicleType

docs.title: hasVehicleUsage
docs.text:
Indicates the usage of the vehicle.

Domain: VehicleCharacteristic

Range: VehicleUsageCode

docs.title: Used in classes
docs.text:
Class VehicleCharacteristic

IRI: https://w3id.org/itsdata/vehicle/v1/hasVehicleUsage

docs.title: hasWidth
docs.text:
Width of the vehicle, including any features embedded or fixed on it, in metres.

Domain: VehicleCharacteristic

Range: cdm1:Length

IRI: https://w3id.org/itsdata/vehicle/v1/hasWidth

docs.title: yearOfFirstRegistration
docs.text:
Indicates the year of the first registration of the vehicle.

Domain: VehicleCharacteristic

Range: xsd:gYear

docs.title: Used in classes
docs.text:
Class VehicleCharacteristic

IRI: https://w3id.org/itsdata/vehicle/v1/yearOfFirstRegistration
